title: App Settings - General - Licenses
scenario: Third-party Software licenses with Source and License links are visible under App Settings > General > Licenses and also present in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements
steps: Verify that the 'Third-party Software' headline is visible
Verify that a list of licenses is displayed
For each license entry, verify that two links are present: Source link and License link
Verify that the same licenses from step 6 are present in the Acknowledgements screen
expected: The 'Third-party Software' headline is visible under App Settings > General > Licenses, with a list of licenses each displaying Source and License links. The same licenses are also present under Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
